summary: Iteration 41c — Recent Simulations log inside Referrals & Matching. Backend: 14/14 tests in test_iteration41c.py PASS (RBAC on list/patch/delete, simulate now returns simulation_id, simulation row written with status=under_review, privacy boundary holds — unique narrative token NEVER leaks, forbidden keys absent, privacy_notice present, PATCH status+note, invalid status 400, unknown id 404, manager_note >400 chars rejected 422, /simulate/save?simulation_id=X links + marks converted, /simulate/save w/o sim id still creates referral, list respects limit + descending ran_at order). Regression on iter41 + iter41b GREEN (25/25). Frontend manager flow end-to-end works — /children?tab=referrals shows 'Recent simulations' panel BELOW active referrals, privacy notice visible, 10 rows render with confidence pills (Manageable with safeguards / Strong match / Elevated placement risk) + status pills (Under review / More info requested / Converted to referral) + metadata (timestamp, manager name, source paste/upload_pdf/upload_txt/quick, score, risk band). Click row → edit modal opens, change status to 'more_info_requested' + rationale note 'Need CAMHS summary before deciding' → save → toast 'Simulation log updated.' → row reflects new status and shows note. Convert flow: ran simulator with 'ZX aged 13 male' narrative → saved as formal referral → returned to /children?tab=referrals → simulation row now shows 'Converted to referral' pill + '→ Linked to formal referral' label. Adult Services hub (/adults) does NOT render simulations panel (count=0) and does NOT expose a Referrals tab — sector boundary intact. Staff RBAC graceful — simulations panel renders empty state 'No simulations recorded yet…' with no JS crash; backend 403 handled gracefully.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~9000+ lines and growing — placement_intelligence endpoints (simulate, simulations list/patch/delete, simulate/save) should ideally be extracted into a dedicated router module along with the rest of placement_intelligence. Not a blocker.

Good: privacy boundary verified explicitly — a unique narrative token inserted into raw_text does NOT appear anywhere in the GET /simulations response text, and forbidden keys (raw_text, needs, known_associates, reason_for_referral, social_worker_name, social_worker_contact, file_name, extracted, police_involvement_history, safeguarding_history) are confirmed absent from log items. This is exactly the right shape for an audit-only log.
Good: pydantic max_length=400 on manager_note correctly returns 422 on overflow.

Good: convert link is bidirectional — /simulate/save?simulation_id=X both creates the referral and updates the source simulation row to status='converted' with converted_referral_id set to the new referral's id. UI surfaces this with a 'Linked to formal referral' label.

Good: staff/senior 403 handled gracefully on the frontend — panel shows empty state instead of crashing. Active referrals card on staff view shows 'Could not load referrals.' toast which is acceptable but could be silenced for RBAC-403 specifically to make the UX cleaner (minor polish, not a defect).
Good: privacy_notice string in list response gives RI/Ofsted reviewers explicit confidence that the audit log is metadata-only — useful when this evidence is exported.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required data-testids present and verified end-to-end: recent-simulations-panel, sim-log-privacy-notice, simulation-row-*, simulation-edit-modal, sim-edit-status, sim-edit-note, sim-edit-save; convert flow links simulation to referral; adults sector boundary holds; staff RBAC graceful)

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123, admin@care.local / Admin@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123 — all confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: Test runs created ~10+ simulation_logs rows + 2 referrals via convert flow tests. Referrals were cleaned up via admin DELETE inside the test bodies. Simulation log rows are intentionally retained as audit history (consistent with the log's purpose).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 41c is fully green. Recent Simulations panel lives at /children?tab=referrals BELOW the active referrals card. Key testids: recent-simulations-panel, sim-log-privacy-notice, simulation-row-{id}, simulation-edit-modal, sim-edit-status (status dropdown: under_review|more_info_requested|not_progressed|converted), sim-edit-note (textarea, max 400 chars), sim-edit-save. POST /api/placement-intelligence/simulate now returns simulation_id in response (required for convert linkage). POST /api/placement-intelligence/simulate/save?simulation_id=X links the new referral to the source simulation and marks the simulation row as status='converted'. GET /api/placement-intelligence/simulations returns {items, privacy_notice, limit}. RBAC: list/patch manager+admin, delete admin only, staff/senior get 403 — frontend handles 403 by showing empty state (no crash). Adult Services hub (/adults) deliberately omits the simulations panel and referrals tab (sector boundary). Backend tests: cd /app && export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && pytest backend/tests/test_iteration41c.py -v.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues to RCA — all 14 backend tests pass, regression on iter41 + iter41b is GREEN, every frontend flow (panel render, privacy notice, row pills, edit modal patch, convert linkage label, adult sector boundary, staff RBAC graceful) behaves exactly as specified.
